input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.4.2
            TITLE: motor controller

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.4.2: Motor Controller
EV.4.2 Motor Controller 
The Tractive System Motor(s) must be connected to the Accumulator through a Motor 
Controller.  No direct connections between Motor(s) and Accumulator.

final_answer: rule EV.4.2: Motor Controller The Tractive System Motor(s) must be connected to the Accumulator through a Motor Controller. No direct connections between Motor(s) and Accumulator.
